transcript.text:
Miss!!!
Miss, let’s make this clear
- (What's going on?) - I'm a man with a family
(Tzuyang x The 80s Are Back New Town Cowboys)
Hello, everyone
I’m in the New Town today
I found a place that looks like an old restaurant
It looks a bit old from the outside
(Right here) Ta-da, here it is
(Bae’s Meat Restaurant 2nd Branch) Looks like it’s run by an old couple
I hope they give me permission to film
(Entering the restaurant) Welcome
Hello!
W... What is this?
I was wondering if... I could film for my YouTube...?
YouTube?

(Bae Yongnam / Seojun’s dad)
A mukbang video...
Oh, I’m sorry, but
our business is already doing well
So you can’t film here
I see no customers though...
Honey, what are you talking about?
(Ryu Inna / Seojun’s mom)
She’s the Tzuran or Tzuyu
Oh, hello
You’re Tzuran, right?
It’s Tzuyang...
Oh, yeah
Tzuyang, Tzuyang, I know you
Oh my my
You know what? If she eats here,

people are going to line up tomorrow
Does she have more subscribers than Minsu?
Huh?
We're close with a few YouTubers, too
But let’s see her channel
(Tzuyang / 7.93M subscribers)
Come this way, please
Come on in
(LOLOLOL) Make yourself comfortable
You can sit anywhere
Don't accept any customers
Lock the door from the outside
This is 'Bae’s' 2nd branch, please send your support
Let’s go, 'Bae’s' 2nd branch!
Nice to meet you, this is the 2nd branch
I love you, Tzuyu

Are you going to sit here?
Oh my my, whose bag is this?!
That's mine...
Oh my my, it’s Ms. Tzuran’s bag
Sorry, sorry
(Seojun’s mom wants to sit next to Tzuran)
Take a picture for me
Can you say, 'Let’s go, the Bae’s!'
Let's go
(Hesitant) The Bae’s!
Do it again, do it again, one more time
The Bae's, the best restaurant chosen by Tzuyang!
Let's go, the Bae's!
That's awesome!
Oh my my, let's move on
(Seojun’s parents are hilarious LOL)

Excuse me, what's good here?
Don't you have the menu?
Let's rip this off, wait a minute
Just show her that one!
You can take this, Ms. Tzuyang!
Tell us what you want, we'll prepare it for you
If you order like pork backbone stew here
We'll go and buy it right away
I'll choose from the menu LOL
There’s nothing bad here
Everything in Bae's is delicious
Oh, that sounds too much like an ad
But it's really delicious
10 servings of pork belly...
Are you eating together?
Oh, just me alone...

Oh, but, let me just...
Hold on, let me just make this clear
You order it
And leave leftovers
There is no refunds
(Money is money to Seojun’s mom..) Of course!
(Straightforward) I'm sorry
If there's any left, I'll take it home
(Let’s start with 10 servings)
Why do you suddenly wipe the table? LOL
I keep it clean all the time
Can you zoom in right here?
This spot right here
Look how much it glows
I clean up every inch of it
We don't want to bother you in any way

Hope you enjoy, and by the way
Our water even tastes delicious...
Oh, the mic is right here
Our water even tastes delicious...
Hope you enjoy
I love you
Wow, she's prettier than I thought!
(Pretty girl)
She's slimmer in person
You're slim, too
(The introvert is getting tired...) They're very hyped up
(Side dish appears) I set everything up perfectly!
(Seojun’s mom’s mbti = EEEE)
This is a plate for you to use
Thank you!
Others might add like

mayonnaise, ketchup, and condiments like that
But not here
Look at this
And lettuce
Bunch of peppers
I don't eat that LOL
Oh, sorry LOL
Her appetite is like a baby
But 10 servings of meat is just too much
Hope you enjoy
Where are the spoons...?
New customers get confused with this
Oh, is it here?!
You're supposed to do this yourself
But it's right here
(Meat appears)

I buy up only this kind of meat that's in Korea
Kimchi!
We age this all by ourselves
Honey, don't do that thing
I have one question
How much to you make a month?
Me?... LOL
Just out of curiosity
She makes more than we do
You look so pretty
(Halts) Hey, but...
How can you...
Why do you cut my compliment in the middle?
Try again, what were you trying to say?
You're way more... beautiful haha
Jeez, you don't have to say that

(Tzuyang’s mbti = IIII) It's fine haha
I didn't come here to hear this
(Let the grill begin..!) I have a motto in life, what's life?
Life is meat, it's funny, right?
Mushrooms coming through!
The mushrooms are here!
This is a freebie
I love Tzuran
Oh, thank you...!
The name is a bit hard, why Tzuyang?
She's so petite and skinny
I'm not sure if she can eat a lot
Why are you looking at her body?
She'll leave if you say things like that
(Let's have a laughing break)
What's wrong?

Why did your face turn red?
Please don't misunderstand
(Don't worry, Seojun’s mom) Of course, I won't!
(Aged kimchi must be paired with pork belly!)
Here's more meat
Bae's meat even sounds delicious
(Getting exhausted LOL)
It sounds like birds chirping
Tweet, tweet, tweet, tweet, tweet
Not at all!
Listen carefully, it sounds alike
She's a bit...
very honest!
Hope you enjoy
Thank you!
I love you

Jeez, I'm so shy
(Worn out)
(Not a tweet, but a beautiful rain sound..!)
The owners are very...
extremely hyped up
(New Town meat restaurant that introverts can’t enter) My soul has already drained out from my body
(The pork belly is cooking properly)
(Even the kimchi...!)
Bon appétit!
Wow, it looks thick and plump and delicious
This looks well-cooked
Let's dip it in the ssamjang* *Red chili and soybean paste
Let’s try it with the aged kimchi, too!
Let's wrap it with the aged kimchi..
So delicious!
First, this aged kimchi is

very delicious
And the meat is
thick cut meat
It has an ideal fat and meat ratio
(Let's try it with the cabbage...!)
(Detects a strange energy) They should be back around now...
It's good, right?
Good, right?
It's really good
Why are you bothering her?
- I'll make you a wrap - Really?
(Wrapping in extreme high-tension...) Do you want garlic?
Yes, I like garlic
Her breath will smell if she eats garlic
Hahaha
I don't think she has a boyfriend

Because if she has one,
then she won't eat garlic, right, honey?
You know, right?
What are you talking about
(Squeezed) Don't I kiss you after you ate garlic?
But I don't because your breath stinks
(Meanwhile, a giant wrap is done...) Your breath stinks real bad
How can she fit that in her mouth?
She can't eat that, oh my gosh
Oh, is this too big?
No, it's fine haha
(She is a pro mukbang YouTuber...)
Wow, amazing
Please enjoy comfortably
You can ignore us and enjoy your food
- Just ignore us - Imagine that we're not here

- Just imagine that we're not here - Please enjoy it comfortably
Does this camera cost about 5 million?
It's way better than Minsu's camera
Minsu is just...
an amateur YouTuber
This is the real stuff
Do you do YouTube?
- Yes, I do - Really?
I'm also a YouTuber
What's the name of your channel?
Jeez, it's a secret
Why, why, why? LOLOLOL
I can't say it on here
- It's hi_ssemi - Jeeez!
Don't say it
She was originally going for 'hi_soosemi'

But decided to go with 'hi_ssemi'
How many subscribers...?
I have 200K
Okay, let's stop here
(Please subscribe and like 'hi_ssemi' & 'Psick Univ'!)
(+ 2 pieces of meat)
(+ Garlic & ssamjang)
(+ wasabi)
But wait, so...
did our voices get properly recorded?
Oh... Would you like a separate mic?
Jeez, it's fine
We're too shy for this stuff
A mic sounds good, I can sing a song!
(Let's just quickly hand it over...LOL)
We're too shy for this stuff

We don't like being on camera
It looks like an advertisement
We...
You have to flip it, honey
Flip it?
We're not greedy with being on camera
(But she smoothly joins...)
(Co-mukbang) I love you, Tzuyang
Oh no, I forgot to give this to Ms. Tzuyang
What is that?
Do you like water parsley?
(Water parsley plate ASMR)
I don't eat water parsley...
Oh, sorry lol
At least film the part where I grill it
Even our water parsley is organic

We pluck them straight from the ground
What if they're not?
They're all from the soil...
Right, water parsley doesn't fall from the sky
(Let's try it) Although I sell it, it's super delicious
You have to do this for mukbang
Oh, do you film mukbangs?
Just once in a while
This is a bite for the subscribers
Open up!
(Even the editor is getting tired...)
This will be so hard for the ones filming
They have to just film while looking at good food
Oh, the filming directors
I want to scout them
Director! While working,

I'll give you my business card, so feel free to reach out
(What's happening in front of my eyes? LOL) I have a lot of interesting ideas
Let's have some fun and try it out together
Bae Yongnam's cooking
Trick...or-treat! How's it?
That's so funny
Pretty good, right?
(She's caught between the two...) Don't say it on camera, someone will copy it
That's my idea
Don't copy it, seriously
I have a lot of these ideas
(My ears are going deaf...) In my idea notepad...
I used to be a comedian a long time ago
He's hilarious when we hang out with our friends
He's a genuine comedian
I have the talent

(Dancing machine)
Then, Ms. Tzuyang
do you have an ideal type?
Except my husband
(LOL?)
Oh, he's not LOL
(Endless apologizing) Oh, I'm sorry LOL
It's okay, you just need to eat a lot of meat
I've been observing her a bit
She's pretty honest
That's why she succeeded
Ms. Tzuyang, then do you have any mukbang YouTubers
that you can introduce to us?
Not a single one!
(Sorry once again...)
I think she only likes eating

He has a great sense of humor
He plays a lot of pranks with younger people
The MZs love me a lot, they really do
(Oh... okay... LOL)
If I didn't marry him, other ladies will be in line
Because he's handsome and tall
You don't think I'll know?
I can't believe I'm saying this myself
But he has a lot of moles
LOL
Try zooming in
It looks like a Big Dipper
More dots, the better
Wow, but you really have a lot LOLOLOL
He looks like Lee Kang-in
(New Town soccer player..) He's my own Lee Kang-in

How do I look like him?
I actually met him before
Do I look like him?
(Shakes head) Who looks better? Be honest
She's super honest
She eats so well
She really does
But I noticed that Tzuyang...
has a reason behind her success
She eats very cleanly
Do you have a boyfriend?
(Tears falling...) I don't have one
Don't you go on blind dates?
Blind dates?
I tried it before... hehe
(Submits evidence) I have a video of it

Let's see the guy!
The moment I see his face,
I can read everything about him, you know?
He's a master
(Choi Joon, Tzuyang's first blind date) His name is Choi Joon
What kind of name is that?
Who is this guy?
You're so beautiful, Tzuyang
Ew, that voice
Why with this guy? He's so mid
Look, honey, he's nuts
Oh my gosh
I was working just now
This is my first time seeing him...
but I don't like him
He looks like my friend Jo Junggu

I'm glad you didn't date him
Minsu is better
(Minsu...?)
I originally can't eat that much
but I can keep eating next to Tzuyang
Oh, do you have a tissue...
(Doesn't sound sorry anymore) I'm sorry hahaha
I had the perfect angle for YouTube
I was ready to put this in my mouth
She's so bad at this
How did she reach 8M subscribers?
Here's a tissue for you
It's going in now, ahh!
That was a bit too much
Demonstrate it for her, honey
How did she blow it?

She made sounds like this and stuff
But you have to go directly for this
So good
Roll up your tongue, look, and learn
Then I can target right here
She's a professional
See, look at this
This became cold now
It's cold
Mine isn't hot
She's so wise, she's got so much wisdom
Oh, here
You spilled something
This is just gochujang...
Miss!
It's just gochujang...

(A two-faced Seojun’s mom...) I love Tzuyang! Sorry about that everyone
But that's wrong
- You should tell me if he spilled something - Okay
(Threatening) That's just wrong
Stop acting busy, honey
No, no, no, I got something to do
That was so wrong, you guys
I'm a man with a family
Tell me what you memorize every night
I’m just...
a son-loving
married man
Honey
You're missing something
I'm a man that only looks at one woman
Why would he say something like that here

Gosh
Enjoy your meal, Ms. Tzuyang
Now...?
Continue eating
Please continue
(Don't fight, please... lol)
(Totally wasted...) I'm too exhausted to even say anything
The wasabi even tastes good
Out of all my videos,
I think
(The editor's finger is about to disappear...) this is the first time the audio wasn't empty
I keep hearing sounds from there
(Even the part-timer's ears are about to go deaf...)
(Thought it will be peaceful now...)
(But the New Town newlyweds return LOL) Oh my my
Where did all the meat disappear?

But hey, I actually
had a strong urge to
introduce someone to Tzuyang
But I think he'll talk behind me
(Confused...)
Men often want to buy food for the ladies
But after looking at her eat,
how can one dare to say that himself?
(Tzuyang's channel has many international subscribers!) I have a lot of viewers overseas, too
Could you please greet them in English...?
Our son goes to an English kindergarten
Our Seojun
To our international viewers,
Um, I love you, thank you
YouTube
'hi_ssemi'

Always
Ring ring
Please send your love
Click click
Honey, speak in English
You try it then!
Um...
Uh...
Hi
I am a...
Mr. Bae
Korea number one
Please come
- Come to restaurant - He's so good
Pork belly
Delicious!

Fighting!
Oh yeah, I forgot to say delicious
(Help my ear...)
So today,
I enjoyed the meal!
(Thanks to 'Kyunga Restaurant Dangsan' for your cooperation) You couldn't eat much because we talked too much, right?
Oh no, it was very funny...
Because we kept talking to her...
How full are you right now?
Me?
It doesn't feel like I ate anything...
